commands: docker exec reportafrica-api node -e "const{Client}=require('pg');const c=new Client({host:process.env.DATABASE_HOST,port:5432,database:'reportafrica',user:'reportafrica_admin',password:'JesusisLord2026!',ssl:{rejectUnauthorized:false}});c.connect().then(()=>c.query(\"DELETE FROM verifications WHERE report_id IN ('21698c1c-3655-459e-8a39-c4160a1bec3a','eb869b6c-0ff5-4b3b-b700-a1cc7b930be3')\")).then(()=>c.query(\"DELETE FROM reports WHERE id IN ('21698c1c-3655-459e-8a39-c4160a1bec3a','eb869b6c-0ff5-4b3b-b700-a1cc7b930be3')\")).then(r=>{console.log('Done:'+r.rowCount);c.end()}).catch(e=>{console.log('E:'+e.message);c.end()})"
